diggs:DocumentInformation.gml:description: File generated via GPR-to-DIGGS conversion script v0.1 Contains references and documentation for all data files for project CPP_OakLane_GPR_S2025

diggs:Project.gml:description: Ground Penetrating Radar survey conducted on Oak Lane on Cal Poly Pomona campus for mapping subsurface utilities. Performed for final project of advanced shallow surface geophysics at Cal Poly Pomona Spring 2025.
diggs:Project.gml:name: CPP_OakLane_GPR_S2025

diggs:GeophysicalFieldSurvey.gml:description: GPR lines running perpendicular to Oak Lane from curb to curb.
diggs:GeophysicalFieldSurvey.gml:name: CPP_OakLane_GPR_S2025 GPR Field Survey

diggs:GP_FieldDataFile.gml:name: Gpr Profiles Shapefile Index File (ARCGIS SHP)

GP_FieldProcedure.gml:description: GPR survey using 650 MHz antenna with continuous acquisition along transect lines.
GP_FieldProcedure.gml:name: GPR Field Procedure near Latitude: 34.059533 Longitude: -117.818018

diggs:GP_Trackline.gml:description: GPR transect line 1 for project CPP_OakLane_GPR_S2025. 650 MHz antenna. Cart-mounted unit with continuous acquisition.
diggs:GP_Trackline.gml:name: GPR_Line-001

diggs:GP_Trackline.gml:description: GPR transect line 1 for project CPP_OakLane_GPR_S2025. 650 MHz antenna. Cart-mounted unit with continuous acquisition.
